name: bci.improve
description: Analyze a failed run and generate improvement suggestions using BCI and TraceAnalysisService. Detects patterns in the failed run trace, scores reusability, retrieves relevant behaviors, and generates actionable improvement recommendations. Useful for root cause analysis and post-mortem workflows.

provider.description: LLM provider to use. If not provided, loads from GUIDEAI_LLM_PROVIDER environment variable.

model.description: Model name to use (e.g., gpt-4o, claude-3-5-sonnet). If not provided, uses provider default.

max_behaviors.description: Maximum number of behaviors to extract from the trace analysis

patterns.description: Detected patterns in the failed run

frequency.description: How many times this pattern appears

suggestions.description: Generated improvement suggestions including root cause analysis, code changes, and preventive measures

behaviors_extracted.description: Behavior names extracted from the trace analysis
